top_signals.title: Databricks CEO on Unifying Data & AI Agents
top_signals.summary: Ali Ghodsi, Co-Founder & CEO at Databricks discusses unified data platforms, AI infrastructure and enterprise strategy with Bloomberg’s Tom Giles at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
